prompt: Create my business profile for my freelance UX consulting business. I work with SaaS startups, charge $150/hour, and specialize in user research and prototyping. Target clients are Series A companies with 10-50 employees.

expectations.text: Output identifies target client profile (Series A, 10-50 employees)

prompt: Create a Voice DNA profile from this writing sample: 'Look, I've been in the trenches. Built three products, failed twice. Here's what actually works - no fluff, just real stuff you can use today. Most UX advice is theoretical garbage. I'll show you what moves the needle.'

expectations.text: Output identifies the tone as direct/conversational
Output captures the anti-fluff value proposition
Output identifies contractions as a style choice
Output creates at least 5 voice attributes

prompt: Run product discovery for my idea: A mobile app that helps freelancers track their time and automatically calculates their effective hourly rate. I want to understand who would use this and what problem it solves.

expectations.text: Output identifies core problems the app would solve
Output maps a basic customer journey
Output surfaces assumptions that need validation
Output proposes next steps for validation

prompt: Create a PRD (Product Requirements Document) for my time tracking app. Key features: manual time entry, automatic rate calculation, invoice generation, export to PDF. Target: freelancers and consultants.

expectations.text: Output lists features with acceptance criteria

prompt: Create a client card for my new client Acme Corp. They're a Series A SaaS company, 30 employees, working with me on a 3-month UX audit project. Value: $15,000. Key contact: Sarah Chen, Head of Product.

expectations.text: Output includes client name and company info

prompt: Generate an invoice for my consulting work. Client: Acme Corp. Project: UX Audit. Hours: 40. Rate: $150/hour. Total: $6,000. Invoice date: 2024-03-15. Due date: 2024-04-15. French micro-entrepreneur format with TVA exoneration.

expectations.text: Output shows line items with hours and rate
Output includes TVA exoneration reference (art. 293 B)
Output includes payment terms and due date

prompt: Create a lead qualification diagnostic for my UX consulting business. I want to qualify prospects before spending time on proposals. Dimensions: Budget, Timeline, Decision Authority, Problem Clarity.

expectations.text: Output defines routing for each band

prompt: Generate a weekly review for my business. Current state: 2 active clients (Acme Corp $15K, Beta Inc $8K), 1 pending proposal (Gamma LLC $12K), 3 overdue invoices totaling $4,500. Revenue this month: $12K. Goal: $20K/month.

expectations.text: Output summarizes current revenue vs goal ($12K vs $20K)
